regional_cost_note: Heat pump installers in Rotorua typically charge $2,600–$4,800 for a single-room unit (supply and install) and $8,500–$20,000 for a multi-split system. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. Get at least 3 quotes — brand, capacity, and installation complexity vary widely and significantly affect the price.
